name: mermaid-extension
description: A Gemini CLI extension specialized in creating diagrams and architectures using Mermaid.

tools.name: validate_mermaid_syntax
tools.description: Validates Mermaid diagram syntax to ensure it is correct before rendering.

tools.name: export_mermaid_to_png
tools.description: Renders Mermaid code into a PNG file and also saves the source .mmd file.
